jest.virtualFolders.name: lf-api-client-core-selfhosted-node
jest.virtualFolders.jestCommandLine: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 24 >/dev/null && node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --rootDir=lib --config jest.node.config.ts --testPathPatterns='\.(unit|selfhosted)\.test\.ts$'

jest.virtualFolders.name: lf-api-client-core-selfhosted-jsdom
jest.virtualFolders.jestCommandLine: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 24 >/dev/null && node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --rootDir=lib --config jest.jsdom.config.ts --testPathPatterns='\.(unit|selfhosted)\.test\.ts$'
